chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S- 335 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders o office objections 2.For hearing of main case 09-06-2023 Syed Mujahid Ali Shah, Advocate along with applicant. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy P.G for the State a/w SIP-Muhammad Sheban, SHO, P.S, Pano Akil. ***** Alleged detenue is present. Vakalatnama filed by Mr. Muhammad Javed Ahmed Maitlo, Advocate on behalf of respondent No.3 is taken on record. He also places on record certain documents under the cover of his statement so also statements filed by official respondents No.1&2 are taken on record and copies whereof are provided to learned counsel for the applicant. It appears to me that a misrepresentation has been made to the Court. The person for whom 491 Cr.P.C has been filed is standing right in front of the Court. As the girl has appeared, section 491 Cr.P.C application has become infructuous and is dismissed as such. I am restrained myself from imposing cost upon the applicant for what appears to be a frivolous litigation. JUDGE Ahmad
